name: Tiansheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Tiansheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. engages in the pharmaceutical manufacturing and circulation activities. It offers products in various categories, including respiratory, digestive, cardiovascular and cerebrovascular, pediatric, gynecological, orthopedic, tumor, hepatobiliary, blood, surgery, diabetes, and other systems, as well as antipyretic, and analgesic and non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs. The company also provides antimicrobials, and vitamins and minerals. Tiansheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Chongqing, China.
